description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using Ruby Docker images and the SAST, Dependency-Scanning, and Secret-Detection templates which add security jobs in the security stage. Define stages security, build, test, codequality, and release. Add a build job (ruby:3.3) that runs gem install bundler --no-document, then bundle update, and publishes Gemfile.lock as an artifact. Add a release job (only on tags, ruby:3.3) that runs gem install bundler --no-document, bundle update, and rake release. Add four rspec jobs (rspec-ruby3.2-rails7.2, rspec-ruby3.3-rails7.2, rspec-ruby3.3-rails8.0, rspec-ruby3.3-rails8.1) in the test stage, each using its specified ruby image, with a before_script that runs ruby -v, echoes RSPEC_RAILS_VERSION, installs bundler ~>2.4, sets BUNDLE_GEMFILE, runs bundle install --jobs=$(nproc) --path="../cache/bundle" and bundle list, caches the cache/ directory keyed by job name, and a script that runs bundle exec rake spec. Add a rubocop job (ruby:3.0) in the codequality stage that installs rubocop rubocop-performance rubocop-rails rubocop-rspec and then runs rubocop.
